name: Protagonist

sheet.name: Protagonist
sheet.background_story:
Explorer and chronicler of the Forsaken Lands, protagonist awoke at the start of the 18th cycle alongside many others at the Church of Her. He believes it to be his destiny to uncover the mysteries of the Appendices of the 17 while journeying with the Lost Pilgrim in the unraveling events of this significant cycle. His name is currently undisclosed. 

Follow his adventure: 
 https://www.youtube.com/@wagdiestory
